headline: Structuring and Tokenizing Distributed User Interest Context for Generative Recommendation

headline: Generating Robot Hands from Human Demonstrations

headline: Pre-nova Observations of T CrB: A view from the CHARA Array
description: T CrB is a symbiotic recurrent nova consisting of a red giant and white dwarf with recent eruptions in 1866 and 1946 and an anticipated eruption in the mid 2020s. headline: Architectural Wisdom: A Framework for Governing Optimization in AI Systems

headline: Intrinsic Computational Functionalism and Simulated Consciousness
description: A common objection to artificial or simulated consciousness is that a simulated brain is no more conscious than simulated water is wet. headline: EDEN: A Large-Scale Corpus of Clinical Notes for Italian

headline: Cultivating logical catalysts for fault-tolerant dyadic phase rotations

headline: Testing the prevalence of hydrogen-silicate miscibility in young sub-Neptunes

headline: Cavity-mediated probabilistic magic $T$-gate injection

headline: When and Which Sensor to Observe? Timely Tracking of a Joint Markov Source
